suggested_action: Investigate why the simulator starts with Unknown data health and transmission state, even when quote source is set. Verify if this persists beyond the first few ticks.
title: Unknown Data and Transmission State on Session Start
summary: Simulator starts with Unknown data/transmission state.
evidence: Snapshot tick: 1 at 9:30 AM shows dataHealth: "UNKNOWN", transmission: "UNKNOWN", marketSource: "UNKNOWN" with quoteSource as "REAL_TRADE_OHLCV_WITH_PATH_FILL".

At Tick 21 (9:50 AM), current intent action is "BUY_CALL" with confidence 81. However, recentMindset at 9:49 AM indicates "AI response failure" and a decision of "WAIT". recentJournal concurrently logs "AI_RESPONSE_FAILURE Failed to fetch" at 9:49 AM and a final decision of "WAIT". This shows a contradiction between the top-level intent and the underlying AI/Model state.
title: Intent Action Contradicts Underlying AI State
suggested_action: Resolve the contradiction where top-level intent presents a BUY action while the mindset and AI decision stream show a WAIT state due to AI response failure. The system must not present a BUY intent if underlying logic dictates a WAIT.
summary: Current Intent action "BUY_CALL" contradicts underlying AI "WAIT" state resulting from model failure.
